description: Inline SVG icons (Heroicons-style) for common UI actions. Use these instead of unicode emojis (inconsistent across platforms) or hallucinated SVG paths (often broken). Each icon is a single-line stroke-based SVG that scales cleanly and inherits currentColor for theming.
promptInjection:
Use inline SVG icons for ALL UI controls. DO NOT use unicode emojis (inconsistent across platforms) or hallucinated SVG paths (likely broken).

**ICON COMPONENT PATTERN:**
Every icon is a single 24×24 SVG with stroke-only paths, sized via CSS, colored via `currentColor`:
```html
<button class="icon-btn" aria-label="Play"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"></polygon></svg></button>
```
```css
.icon-btn { background:none; border:none; padding:8px; cursor:pointer; color:inherit; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border-radius:6px; }
.icon-btn:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }
```

**COMMON ICON SVG PATHS** (all 24×24 stroke-only, currentColor):

- **play**: `<polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"></polygon>`
- **pause**: `<rect x="6" y="4" width="4" height="16"></rect><rect x="14" y="4" width="4" height="16"></rect>`
- **stop**: `<rect x="5" y="5" width="14" height="14" rx="1"></rect>`
- **reset / refresh**: `<polyline points="23 4 23 10 17 10"></polyline><polyline points="1 20 1 14 7 14"></polyline><path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0 1 14.85-3.36L23 10"></path><path d="M1 14l4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0 0 20.49 15"></path>`
- **plus**: `<line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
- **minus**: `<line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>`
- **x / close**: `<line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"></line><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"></line>`
- **check / checkmark**: `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`
- **trash**: `<polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"></polyline><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"></path>`

- **clock**: `<circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"></polyline>`
- **bell**: `<path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"></path><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"></path>`
- **heart**: `<path d="M20.84 4.61a5.5 5.5 0 0 0-7.78 0L12 5.67l-1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 0 0-7.78 7.78l1.06 1.06L12 21.23l7.78-7.78 1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 0 0 0-7.78z"></path>`
- **star**: `<polygon points="12 2 15.09 8.26 22 9.27 17 14.14 18.18 21.02 12 17.77 5.82 21.02 7 14.14 2 9.27 8.91 8.26 12 2"></polygon>`
- **link**: `<path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path>`
- **external-link**: `<path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path><polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline><line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>`
- **logout**: `<path d="M9 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4"></path><polyline points="16 17 21 12 16 7"></polyline><line x1="21" y1="12" x2="9" y2="12"></line>`

**HELPER FUNCTION** (drop into JS for programmatic icon mounting):
```javascript
const ICON_PATHS = {
  play: '<polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"></polygon>',
  pause: '<rect x="6" y="4" width="4" height="16"></rect><rect x="14" y="4" width="4" height="16"></rect>',
  // ... copy more as needed
};
function icon(name, sizePx = 24) {
  return `<svg width="${sizePx}" height="${sizePx}" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">${ICON_PATHS[name] || ''}</svg>`;
}
// Usage: btn.innerHTML = icon('play');
```

**RULES:**
- Always wrap the SVG in a 24×24 viewBox + currentColor + stroke-width=2 — that's the standard the snippets above use.
- Use `aria-label` on icon-only buttons for accessibility.
- Pull from this list FIRST. Only define a custom path if the icon you need isn't here.
- DO NOT inline raster images (PNG/JPG data URIs) — model often hallucinates broken base64.
- DO NOT use unicode emojis (▶ ⏸ ⏹) — they look different on every platform and break dark-mode contrast.

icons._format: Each entry: {paths: [...inner SVG strings], description, semanticGroup}. Wrap in standard 24x24 stroke=currentColor outer SVG.

paths: <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
<rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>

outerSvgWrapper: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">{paths}</svg>
license: Icons modeled after Lucide / Feather (ISC license, public-domain compatible). Stroke-only design, no copyrighted glyphs.
